Home›Services› Phishing Simulation Services
Security Awareness Testing

Phishing Simulation &
Social Engineering Testing

Realistic phishing campaigns tailored to your organization — measuring click rates, credential submissions, and reporting behavior across your entire workforce.

Measure Your Human Security Layer

Your technical controls are only as strong as your people. We design and execute realistic phishing simulations tailored to your industry, company size, and specific threat profile. Our campaigns replicate actual attack patterns including business email compromise (BEC), credential harvesting, and malware delivery lures.

Phishing Campaign Types

  • Customized email phishing campaigns with branded templates
  • Spear phishing targeting executives and privileged users
  • Voice phishing (vishing) campaigns against helpdesk and staff
  • SMS phishing (smishing) exercises for mobile-heavy workforces
  • Physical social engineering and in-person pretexting
  • USB drop testing in physical office environments
  • Baseline measurement and multi-campaign progress tracking
  • Post-campaign security awareness training integration

Reporting & Metrics

Every engagement delivers a comprehensive report with click rates, credential submission rates, reporting rates, and department-level breakdowns. We benchmark your results against industry standards and track improvement across successive campaigns — giving you measurable evidence of security culture progress over time.

Who Should Run Phishing Simulations?

Organizations subject to SOC 2, HIPAA, ISO 27001, CMMC, or NIST 800-171 require documented security awareness programs as part of compliance. Phishing simulations also satisfy insurer requirements for cyber liability coverage and provide concrete data for board-level risk reporting.

Test Types

  • Email Phishing
  • Spear Phishing
  • Vishing (Voice)
  • Smishing (SMS)
  • Physical Social Engineering
  • USB Drop Tests

Frameworks Supported

  • NIST SP 800-53
  • CMMC Level 2
  • SOC 2 Type II
  • ISO 27001 A.7.2.2
  • HIPAA §164.308

Launch in 48 Hours

We can deploy your first phishing simulation within 48 hours of engagement initiation.

Schedule Assessment 301-352-4855
